# International Journal of Education Policy — Author Guidelines (Synthetic Fixture)

**Journal:** International Journal of Education Policy
**Publisher:** Springer
**ISSN:** 2222-3333 (print), 4444-5555 (online)
**URL:** https://www.example-ijep.com

## Aims and Scope

The International Journal of Education Policy publishes theoretical and
empirical research on education policy, higher education governance, curriculum
development, and institutional analysis in education.

## Article Types

- **Research Article**: original empirical or theoretical research
- **Review Article**: systematic literature review
- **Policy Brief**: short analysis of specific policy issue
- **Commentary**: response to published work

## Submission Requirements

- **Language:** English
- **Abstract:** 200-250 words
- **Word count:** 6,000-12,000 words (excluding references and appendices)
- **Keywords:** 5-8
- **Citation style:** APA 7th edition

## Language Policy

English only.

## Peer Review

- **Model:** Double-blind peer review
- **Timeline:** 6-10 weeks
